name: brainana-viewer
description: Cross-platform NiiVue viewer for brainana pipeline output (source-first rebuild).
//workspaces: Multi-tool monorepo: shared packages/* consumed by apps/*. Globs match nothing until packages are extracted (harmless no-op meanwhile); see docs/technical-route-and-improvement-plan.md.
//browserslist: Single source of the evergreen support policy (roadmap §6.3): Chrome/Edge baseline, Firefox/Safari last 2 majors. WebGL2 is a hard requirement gated at runtime in browserCapabilities.ts. Out of scope: mobile/legacy.
